budget_interpretation: These are fixed motivation/baseline controls authorized by their listed protocols, not proposed-system tuning. R1 includes its one pre-registered recheck; D1/D2/D2h/D2s epochs and weights were selected on train only, never from these dev metrics. C5-R2 adds three fixed wrong-history controls. C5-R3 adds six fixed removal-ablation evaluations with the existing beta and no tuning; its primary, sole fallback, and terminal rule were frozen before outcomes.

b9_neighbors.status: fixed three-seed evaluations; supplementary while human-review provenance remains pending

c5r2_temporal_identity_repair.status: fixed three-seed temporal wrong-D2s controls; scientific gate failed

c5r3_candidate_history_alignment.status: fixed item-only/category-only removal ablations; integrity passed; primary and sole fallback failed; terminal benchmark/analysis-only

d1_supervised_diagnostics.status: nine frozen model evaluations plus three authorized wrong-history rescores

d2s_complete_static_waterline.status: post-result fairness repair; fixed true/wrong-history evaluations without retraining

r1_router.status: two coupled outputs evaluated once and rechecked once under the frozen low-recovery branch

scope: 55 evaluator invocations appended during the R1/B9 and repaired intro-motivation work, including C5-R2 and the terminal C5-R3 component gate
